Literal.Value:
'library(ggplot2)

# -------- DATA PREP --------
dataset <- dataset[, 1:3]
colnames(dataset) <- c("user_name", "metric1", "metric2")

dataset$user_name <- as.character(dataset$user_name)
dataset$metric1 <- as.numeric(dataset$metric1)
dataset$metric2 <- as.numeric(dataset$metric2)

dataset <- dataset[!is.na(dataset$user_name) &
                   !is.na(dataset$metric1) &
                   !is.na(dataset$metric2), ]

dataset <- unique(dataset)
dataset <- dataset[order(dataset$metric1, decreasing = TRUE), ]

if (nrow(dataset) == 0) {
  stop("No usable rows found.")
}

# -------- SCALE --------
m1_max <- max(dataset$metric1, na.rm = TRUE)
m2_max <- max(dataset$metric2, na.rm = TRUE)

if (m1_max == 0) m1_max <- 1
if (m2_max == 0) m2_max <- 1

scale_factor <- m1_max / m2_max

# -------- BUILD DATA --------
plot_data <- data.frame(
  user_name = rep(dataset$user_name, 2),
  metric_type = rep(c("Primary", "Secondary"), each = nrow(dataset)),
  value = c(dataset$metric1, dataset$metric2 * scale_factor),
  label = c(round(dataset$metric1, 2), round(dataset$metric2, 2))
)

plot_data$user_name <- factor(plot_data$user_name, levels = dataset$user_name)

# -------- PLOT --------
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = user_name, y = value, fill = metric_type)) +
  
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "white",
    family = "Segoe UI",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # đźŽ¨ YOUR CUSTOM COLORS HERE
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Primary" = "#4A4C60",
      "Secondary" = "#B7C298"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Segoe UI") +
  theme(
    # Background & border
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#20222D", color = "#20222D"),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#20222D", color = "#20222D"),
    panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "#20222D"),
    
    # Remove legend & titles
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    
    # Axis text
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 12,
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      color = "white",
      family = "Segoe UI"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 10,
      color = "white",
      family = "Segoe UI"
    ),
    
    # Grid
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#44475A")
  )'
